summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of VMS360 Zone Drawing UI. All core features are working correctly: Tab system (Kameralar/Bölgeler), zone drawing mode, canvas click to add points, zone form inputs, zone type dropdown with color selection, zone creation, zone edit mode, and zone list display.
passed_tests: Tab system works - Kameralar/Bölgeler tabs switch correctly
Yeni Bölge Çiz button activates drawing mode
Canvas click adds points to zone polygon (tested with 3 and 4 points)
Zone form inputs work - name input, type dropdown, show_heatmap toggle
Zone type dropdown shows all 6 types with correct colors (Koridor, Giriş, Meydan, Mağaza, Yasak Bölge, Genel)
Tamamla button saves zone (requires 3+ points and name) - 'Bölge eklendi' toast appears
İptal button cancels drawing mode - returns to 'Yeni Bölge Çiz' button
Existing zones display on canvas with labels and colored fills
Zone edit mode works - clicking zone in list shows 'Bölge Düzenleniyor' form with Kaydet button
Zone list shows all zones with type labels and delete buttons
Camera placement tab (Kameralar) still works - shows Yerleştirilmiş and Mevcut cameras
Point counter shows correct count during drawing (e.g., '4 nokta eklendi')
Son Noktayı Geri Al button visible during drawing mode
Helper text updates based on mode (drawing vs camera placement)
critical_code_review_comments: Zone drawing implementation uses canvas click events with proper coordinate transformation
Zone types have predefined colors that auto-update when type is selected
Zone form validation requires 3+ points and non-empty name before enabling Tamamla button
Edit mode properly loads zone data into form fields
Tab system correctly separates camera and zone management functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test zone 'Test Bölge UI' during testing (may still exist on floor c713f669-075f-4e06-b252-9b5fd57ac1eb)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zone Drawing UI fully tested. All features working: Tab system (Kameralar/Bölgeler), zone drawing with canvas clicks, zone form (name, type dropdown, show_heatmap toggle), zone CRUD operations. Test floor ID: c713f669-075f-4e06-b252-9b5fd57ac1eb has 6 zones including test zone 'Test Bölge UI'. Zone types: corridor, entrance, plaza, shop, restricted, general with corresponding colors.

tab_system.bolgeler_tab: Shows zone drawing controls and zone list

zone_drawing_mode.activation: Yeni Bölge Çiz button activates drawing mode
zone_drawing_mode.canvas_click: Adds polygon points with visual feedback (numbered points)
zone_drawing_mode.point_counter: Shows '0 nokta eklendi' updating as points are added
zone_drawing_mode.undo_point: Son Noktayı Geri Al button removes last point

zone_form.name_input: Text input with placeholder 'Örn: Ana Koridor'

zone_actions.tamamla: Saves zone via API, shows 'Bölge eklendi' toast
zone_actions.iptal: Cancels drawing mode, returns to initial state
zone_actions.edit: Click zone in list to edit, shows 'Bölge Düzenleniyor' form
zone_actions.delete: Trash icon on each zone item (confirmation dialog)

zone_visualization.canvas_display: Zones shown with colored fills, borders, and labels
zone_visualization.selected_highlight: Selected zone has more prominent styling

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/03_kat_planlari_page.png - Kat Planları page with floor card
.screenshots/14_zone_type_changed.png - Zone type changed to Yasak Bölge
